title: Whole blood T cell assay for NHPs, containment protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aosa1","text":"This is a protocol used to perform T cell assays using whole blood (collected in EDTA tubes) or cells from bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL). We have successfully used this protocol for rhesus macaques, cynomolgus macaques, and African green monkeys (although antibody mix provided was titrated on macaques). It allows the characterization of T cells into Th1 and Th2 (or Tc1 and Tc2) phenotypes. It technically offers 64 different activation profiles (4 cytokines + CD107a + CD69).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a9q81","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kblb","text":"The nature and concentration of the stimulant is left unspecified as we have used different ones depending on reagent availability.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bcnb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fge38","text":"This protocol was designed to deal with samples coming from containment labs (\u003e CL2) at our facility. If you are using this protocol at a different facility please ensure that proper testing and approvals are in place. The protocol can be used for experiments completed entirely in CL2, simply go from step 17 directly to 31.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5apq8","text":"For BAL fluid, make sure to set FSC voltage much lower than for whole blood.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9q8pq","text":"The antibody mix described in the methods was tested on Cynomolgus macaque whole blood and BAL fluid. All antibodies should cross-react with rhesus macaques and African green monkeys but the panel might need to be re-titrated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare the staining mix. (for 1 sample:) %s %s Supplier Antibody Clone Channel Volume per test BD Biosciences CD45 D058-1283 BUV395 1.25 BD Biosciences CD3 SP34-2 BUV496 5 BD Biosciences CD8 RPA-T8 BUV563 1.25 BD Biosciences CD16 3G8 BUV737 5 BD Biosciences CD45RA 5H9 BV421 0.625 BD Biosciences CD49d 9F10 BV480 5 BD Biosciences CD4 L200 BV605 0.625 BD Biosciences CD14 M5E2 BV650 5 BD Biosciences CD123 7G3 BV786 1.25 BD Biosciences CD25 M-A251 BB515 5 Miltenyi Biotec CD66abce TET2 PerCP-Vio700 1 BD Biosciences CD163 GHI/61 PE 20 BD Biosciences CCR7 2-L1-A PE-CF594 0.625 BD Biosciences HLA-DR L243 PE/Fire640 1.25 BD Biosciences CD69 FN50 PE-Cy7 5 BD Biosciences TCRgd B1 APC 5 CD20 2H7 Alexa 700 0.625 Total 63.5 BD Brilliant Stain 36.5
Put 5 µl of TruStain FcX in each tube/well. Human TruStain FcX BioLegend Catalog #422302
Incubate 10 min at Room Temperature (RT). 00:10:00 Room temperature
Add stain mix. Mix. 100 µL
Incubate 20 min at RT in the dark. Room temperature 00:20:00
Add 2 ml of 1X FACS Lysing solution. Vortex immediately, but gently. 2 mL
Incubate no more than 12 min at RT in the dark. 00:10:00, No more than 12 minutes
Spin at 300 x g for 5 min. 300 x g, 20 °C, 5 minutes
Decant supernatant.
Add 2 ml of PBS. Vortex. 2 mL PBS Contributed by users
Spin at 300 x g for 5 min. 300 x g, 20 °C, 5 minutes
Decant supernatant.
Resuspend in Cytofix/Cytoperm. BD Cytofix/Cytoperm Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554722
100 µl per 5 x 10 5 cells.
Use at least 400 µl for easy decanting.
Incubate at least 30 min at RT in the dark. 00:30:00 Room temperature, In the dark.
Spin at 500 x g for 8-10 min. 500 x g, 20 °C, 8 minutes
On a clean bench, decant supernatant.
Use same volume of Cytofix/Cytoperm as before to resuspend the cells. BD Cytofix/Cytoperm Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554722
Transfer in a 2 ml screwcap tube. Shake the tube to cover all surfaces with Cytofix/Cytoperm. 2 ml screw-cap tubes (Microtubes, Sarstedt, 72.694.006)
Tubes can be opened in CL2 (in a BSC) no less than 30 min after the resuspension (step 17). (Samples are generally processed the next day; keep at 4 C overnight, in the dark)
Give tubes a quick spin in a tabletop centrifuge.
Ensure all tubes have at least a few hundred microliters of Cytofix/Cytoperm.
Transfer the samples into 1 ml of BD BD Perm/Wash buffer Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554723 in FACS tubes.
Spin at 500 x g for 8-10 min. 500 x g, 20 °C, 8 minutes
Decant supernatant.
Repeat steps 31-33.
Resuspend in 100 µl of intracellular staining mix.

Prepare the 1X FACS Lysing solution by diluting the 10X stock with Milli-Q water. You will need 2 ml of 1X solution for each sample. BD FACS Lysing Solution (10X) Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #349202
Add 5 µl of the Ghost Dye Red 780 Tonbo Biosciences Catalog #13-0865-T500 If staining BAL: Add 5 µl of 1:100 diluted Ghost Dye.
Incubate 20 min at RT in the dark. Room temperature 00:20:00
Transfer tubes from containment space to CL2 space according to the facility's approved protocols/SOPs.
Gating strategy for whole blood:
Aliquot 100 µL, whole blood into a tube or well.
Add 200 µL, cRPMI containing 1.5 X the desired concentration of stimulant. (Stimulant(s) and concentration depend on the experiment and can include anti-CD28 and anti-CD49d)
Mix and incubate at 37 °C, 5% CO2 Overnight .
Add monensin and brefeldin A, assuming 1e6 cells. Anti-CD107a BV421 can be added here as well ( 5 µL )
Mix and incubate at 37 °C, 5% CO2 06:00:00 .

Prepare the staining mix. (for 1 sample:) (uses BD Perm/Wash buffer Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554723 ) %s %s Supplier Antibody Clone Channel Volume per test BD Biosciences CD45 D058-1283 BUV395 1.25 BD Biosciences CD3 SP34-2 BUV496 5 BD Biosciences CD8 RPA-T8 BUV563 1.25 BD Biosciences CD16 3G8 BUV737 5 BD Biosciences CD45RA 5H9 BV421 0.625 BD Biosciences CD49d 9F10 BV480 5 BD Biosciences CD4 L200 BV605 0.625 BD Biosciences CD14 M5E2 BV650 5 BD Biosciences CD123 7G3 BV786 1.25 BD Biosciences CD25 M-A251 BB515 5 Miltenyi Biotec CD66abce TET2 PerCP-Vio700 1 BD Biosciences CD163 GHI/61 PE 20 BD Biosciences CCR7 2-L1-A PE-CF594 0.625 BD Biosciences HLA-DR L243 PE/Fire640 1.25 BD Biosciences CD69 FN50 PE-Cy7 5 BD Biosciences TCRgd B1 APC 5 CD20 2H7 Alexa 700 0.625 Total 63.5 BD Brilliant Stain 36.5
Incubate 4 °C 00:30:00
Add 1 mL BD Perm/Wash buffer Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554723 .
500 x g, 4 °C, 8 minutes
Decant supernatant and blot tubes/plate.
Repeat steps 38-40.
Resuspend in PBS 1% formaldehyde.
Run on flow cytometer.
creator: Jonathan Audet
